Container.Name: terraria-connection-logger
Container.Overview: Monitors a Terraria server container's Docker logs and records connection attempts (IP and port) to a CSV file. Point it at your Terraria container by name (recommended) or ID.

Config.Name: Terraria Container
Config.Description: Name (recommended) or ID of your Terraria container. The name is stable; an ID like 8ec2734d585e changes when the container is recreated.

Config.Name: Print To Console
Config.Description: Also print matched connection attempts to this container's log.

Config.Name: Retry Seconds
Config.Description: Seconds to wait before retrying when the Terraria container is missing or the log stream drops.

Config.Name: Log File Path (in container)
Config.Description: Path inside the container where the CSV log is written. Must live under the /logs mount.

Config.Name: Logs
Config.Description: Where connection logs are saved on Unraid.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Read-only access to the Docker socket so the logger can read the Terraria container's logs. Required.
